2604.25530.title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Canonical Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
2604.25530.paper_summary: Recent knowledge distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation introduce increasingly complex hand-crafted objectives, yet are typically evaluated under fixed iteration schedules. These objectives substantially increase per-iteration cost, meaning equal iteration counts do not correspond to equal training budgets. It is therefore unclear whether reported gains reflect stronger distillation signals or simply greater compute. We show that iteration-based comparisons are misleading: when wall-clock compute is matched, \textit{canonical} logit- and feature-based KD outperform recent segmentation-specific methods. Under extended training, feature-based distillation achieves state-of-the-art ResNet-18 performance on Cityscapes and ADE20K. A PSPNet ResNet-18 student closely approaches its ResNet-101 teacher despite using only one quarter of the parameters, reaching 99\% of the teacher's mIoU on Cityscapes (79.0 vs.\ 79.8) and 92\% on ADE20K. Our results challenge the prevailing assumption that KD for segmentation requires task-specific mechanisms and suggest that scaling, rather than complex hand-crafted objectives, should guide future method design.
2604.25530.paper_summary_zh: 最近的知識蒸餾（KD）方法在語義分割中引入了越來越複雜的手工設計目標，但通常是在固定的迭代計劃下進行評估。這些目標大幅增加了每次迭代的成本，意味著相同的迭代次數並不對應於相等的訓練預算。因此，報告的增益是否反映了更強的蒸餾信號或只是更大的計算量尚不清楚。我們顯示基於迭代的比較具有誤導性：當牆鐘計算量匹配時，\textit{canonical} logit 和特徵基礎的 KD 超越了最近的特定分割方法。在擴展訓練下，基於特徵的蒸餾在 Cityscapes 和 ADE20K 上達到了最先進的 ResNet-18 性能。一個 PSPNet ResNet-18 學生在參數僅為四分之一的情況下，接近其 ResNet-101 教師，在 Cityscapes 上達到教師 mIoU 的 99\%（79.0 對 79.8）和 ADE20K 上的 92\%。我們的結果挑戰了當前的假設，即用於分割的 KD 需要特定任務的機制，並建議未來的方法設計應以擴展而非複雜的手工設計目標為指導。
2604.25530.author: Muhammad Ali et.al.
2604.25530.authors: Muhammad Ali, Kevin Alexander Laube, Madan Ravi Ganesh, Lukas Schott, Niclas Popp, Thomas Brox
